com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList

Description
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel
 
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers
 

  • Uses of DoublyLinkedList in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel

    Methods in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel that return DoublyLinkedList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DoublyLinkedList<TopArtistRowData>
    TopArtistsViewModel.buildAllArtistsRankedData()
    Builds all artist rows for the analytics modal synchronously, ranked by total listening time descending.

  • Uses of DoublyLinkedList in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers

    Methods in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers that return DoublyLinkedList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DoublyLinkedList<Artist>
    ListeningPaginationService.getAllArtistsRankedByTime()
    Returns all artists in the library ranked by total listening time descending.
    DoublyLinkedList<Album>
    ListeningPaginationService.getAllTopAlbums()
    Returns all top albums sorted by total listening time, descending.
    DoublyLinkedList<Artist>
    ListeningPaginationService.getAllTopArtists()
    Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending.
    DoublyLinkedList<Song>
    ListeningPaginationService.getAllTopSongs()
    Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending.
    DoublyLinkedList<PlaybackHistory>
    ListeningHistoryService.getListeningHistory()
    Returns complete listening history as a DoublyLinkedList for pagination.
    <T> DoublyLinkedList<T>
    AnalyticsCacheService.getOrLoad(String key, Supplier<DoublyLinkedList<T>> loader)
    Returns the cached list for key, or loads it via loader on a cache miss, stores it, and returns the result.
    DoublyLinkedList<Album>
    ListeningPaginationService.getTopAlbumsWindow(int offset, int limit)
    Returns the full top albums ranking for use by TopAlbumsViewModel.
    DoublyLinkedList<Artist>
    ListeningPaginationService.getTopArtistsWindow(int offset, int limit)
    Returns the full top artists ranking for use by analytics preview cards.
    DoublyLinkedList<Song>
    ListeningPaginationService.getTopSongsWindow(int offset, int limit)
    Returns the full top songs ranking for use by TopSongsViewModel.
    Method parameters in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers with type arguments of type DoublyLinkedList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> DoublyLinkedList<T>
    AnalyticsCacheService.getOrLoad(String key, Supplier<DoublyLinkedList<T>> loader)
    Returns the cached list for key, or loads it via loader on a cache miss, stores it, and returns the result.
    <E,D> void
    GenericModalLoader.loadAndShow(javafx.scene.layout.StackPane parentPane, String title, Supplier<DoublyLinkedList<E>> listLoader, Function<E,D> mapper, Function<D, javafx.scene.Node> rowRenderer, int pageSize)
    Loads a full dataset asynchronously, maps each raw item to a display DTO, then opens a paginated modal backed entirely by the in-memory list.
